title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Tara goes out looking for Shreemoyee in the middle of the night. On her way, she meets a priestess and asks her help to look for Shreemoyee. The priestess tells her that she has to complete a difficult task if she wants to save Shreemoyee.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

title: Jai Jagannath
subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Kartikeya finally accepts Parvati as his mother. Diti is furious with Lord Shiva and seeks revenge on him for the death of her son and grandson.
